rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.0581 governs certificate revocation for assisting sexual misconduct perpetrators in obtaining school employment. The two provisions share no operative overlap.
quote: The board may suspend or revoke a certificate held by a person under this subchapter, impose other sanctions against the person, or refuse to issue a certificate to the person under this subchapter
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator certification revocation provision.
